message:
fix(mobile): isolate overlay errors to prevent full app crash

Add ErrorBoundary wrappers around eager-loaded overlays so that a
single overlay failure (e.g., BottomSheet rendering issue on specific
mobile devices) doesn't take down the entire app. Instead, the failing
overlay shows an error state with retry option.

Changes:
- OverlayManager: Wrap all eager overlays in EagerOverlayBoundary
- BottomSheet: Add SSR guard for document.body check
- mobile-ux.css: Bump touch targets from 44px to 45px for WCAG 2.5.5
  (1px safety margin for subpixel rounding)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
